description: All scripting functions for sampler specific functionality.

createListFromGUISelection.description: Returns a list of the sounds selected in the samplemap.

createListFromScriptSelection.description: Returns a list of the sounds selected by the selectSounds() method.

createSelection.description: Returns an array with all samples that match this regex.

createSelectionFromIndexes.description: Returns an array with all samples from the index data (can be either int or array of int, -1 selects all.).

createSelectionWithFilter.description: Returns an array with all samples that match the filter function.

enableRoundRobin.description: Enables / Disables the automatic round robin group start logic (works only on samplers).

getActiveRRGroup.description: Returns the currently (single) active RR group.

getActiveRRGroupForEventId.description: Returns the RR group that is associated with the event ID.

getAttribute.description: Gets the attribute with the given index (use the constants for clearer code).

getAttributeId.description: Returns the ID of the attribute with the given index.

getAttributeIndex.description: Returns the index of the attribute with the given ID.

getAudioWaveformContentAsBase64.description: Converts the user preset data of a audio waveform to a base 64 samplemap.

getComplexGroupManager.description: Returns an object that can be used to control the complex group management of this sampler.

getCurrentSampleMapId.description: Returns the currently loaded sample map.

getMicPositionName.description: Returns the name of the channel with the given index (Multimic samples only.

getNumActiveGroups.description: Returns the number of currently active groups.

getNumMicPositions.description: Returns the number of mic positions.

getNumSelectedSounds.description: Returns the amount of selected samples.

getReleaseStartOptions.description: Returns the current release start options as JSON object.

getRRGroupsForMessage.description: Returns the amount of actual RR groups for the notenumber and velocity

getSampleMapAsBase64.description: Returns a base64 compressed string containing the entire samplemap.

getSampleMapList.description: Returns an array with all available sample maps.

getSoundProperty.description: Returns the property of the sound with the specified index.

getTimestretchOptions.description: Returns the current timestretching options as JSON object.

importSamples.description: Loads a few samples in the current samplemap and returns a list of references to these samples.

isMicPositionPurged.description: Checks if the mic position is purged.

isNoteNumberMapped.description: Checks whether the note number is mapped to any samples.

loadSampleForAnalysis.description: Loads the content of the given sample into an array of VariantBuffers that can be used for analysis.

loadSampleMap.description: Loads a new samplemap into this sampler.

loadSampleMapFromBase64.description: Loads a base64 compressed string with the samplemap.

loadSampleMapFromJSON.description: Loads a samplemap from a list of JSON objects.

loadSfzFile.description: Loads an SFZ file into the sampler.

parseSampleFile.description: Creates a JSON object from the sample file that can be used with loadSampleMapFromJSON.

purgeMicPosition.description: Purges all samples of the given mic (Multimic samples only).

purgeSampleSelection.description: Purges the array of sampler sounds (and unpurges the rest).

refreshInterface.description: Refreshes the interface. Call this after you changed the properties.

refreshRRMap.description: Recalculates the RR Map. Call this at compile time if you want to use 'getRRGroupForMessage()'.

saveCurrentSampleMap.description: Saves (and loads) the current samplemap to the given path (which should be the same string as the ID).

selectSounds.description: Selects samples using the regex string as wildcard and the selectMode ("SELECT", "ADD", "SUBTRACT")

setActiveGroup.description: Enables the group with the given index (one-based). Works only with samplers and `enableRoundRobin(false)`.

setActiveGroupForEventId.description: Enables the group with the given index (one-based) for the given event ID. Works only with samplers and `enableRoundRobin(false)`.

setAllowReleaseStart.description: Enable / disables the release start feature for the given event.

setAttribute.description: Sets a attribute to the given value.

setGUISelection.description: Sets the currently selected samples on the interface to the given list.

setMultiGroupIndex.description: Enables the group with the given index (one-based). Allows multiple groups to be active.

setMultiGroupIndexForEventId.signature: void setMultiGroupIndexForEventId(int eventId, var groupIndex, bool enabled)
setMultiGroupIndexForEventId.description: Enables the group with the given index (one-based) for the given event id. Allows multiple groups to be active.

setReleaseStartOptions.description: Sets the options for the release start behaviour.

setRRGroupVolume.description: Sets the volume of a particular group (use -1 for active group). Only works with disabled crossfade tables.

setSortByRRGroup.description: Enables a presorting of the sounds into RR groups. This might improve the performance at voice start if you have a lot of samples (> 20.000) in many RR groups.

setSoundProperty.signature: void setSoundProperty(int soundIndex, int propertyIndex, var newValue)
setSoundProperty.description: Sets the property for the index within the selection.

setSoundPropertyForAllSamples.description: Sets the property for all samples of the sampler.

setSoundPropertyForSelection.description: Sets the property of the sampler sound for the selection.

setTimestretchOptions.description: Sets the timestretching options from a JSON object.

setTimestretchRatio.description: Sets the timestretch ratio for the sampler depending on its timestretch mode.

setUseStaticMatrix.description: Disables dynamic resizing when a sample map is loaded.
